messages.text: Hi there! Thanks for reaching out to Vetsource Support. I'm Jordan. How can I help you with your account today?
Hey Jordan, I need to update the card on file for my upcoming auto-shipments please.
I can absolutely get that updated for you. Whenever you are ready, please reply with the card number, expiration date, and the CVV code.
Sounds good. The card number is 2280853762382207. Exp is 04/30 and security code is 789.
Perfect, thank you. One moment while the system securely processes those changes... Alright, you are all set! Your payment method has been updated successfully.
Awesome, that was super easy. Thanks!
You're welcome! Feel free to reach out if you need anything else. Have a wonderful day!

resolution: Payment details successfully updated dynamically via user input.
